emails.subject: paper and pulp bankruptcy training
emails.body: paper and pulp bankruptcy training Mark: Would you be available sometime on Tuesday, March 18 to conduct (again) your bankruptcy discussion for a smaller focused paper and pulp commercial group? I'd like to schedule as soon as possible. We can meet at your convenience. Please respond. Sara Shackleton Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3801a Houston, TX 77002 Ph: (713) 853-5620 Fax: (713) 646-3490

emails.subject: RE: paper and pulp bankruptcy training
emails.body: RE: paper and pulp bankruptcy training i am free on tuesday (the 19th?) any time after 11:30.

emails.subject: RE: paper and pulp bankruptcy training
emails.body: Mark: Great! Tuesday, March 19, at 2 pm, location TBD in ECS. Sara
